blockers.detail: PLATINUM-G1 incorrectly marked complete. quality_scale.yaml says test-coverage: done but coverage is 85%, target is 100%. quality_scale.yaml corrected to todo.
PLATINUM-G2 incorrectly marked complete. 3-seed verification not performed.

notes: Agent cleaned up test files (CLEANUP-TESTS done), extracted pure functions (REFACTOR-T1/2/3 done), removed all pragma:no cover markers (PRAGMA-A/B/C done). quality_scale.yaml created but test-coverage was prematurely marked done. Coverage is 85% (616 lines from target 100%). 1005 tests pass. Remaining gap: 15% coverage (calculations.py 88%, trip_manager.py 77%, emhass_adapter.py 78%, config_flow.py 83%, dashboard.py 82%).
